weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread.

weapons.name: Romero 77 Alamo
weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread. Modified with an added magazine and loader.

weapons.name: Scottfield
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate on single-action pistols, making the slow-cycling Scottfield much more effective in close range.

weapons.name: Scottfield Brawler
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Modified with brass knuckles for melee. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning boosts the slow fire rate of this single-action revolver, allowing rapid follow-up shots in melee range.

weapons.name: Scottfield Precision
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Modified with an added stock.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning turns this single-action revolver into a close-range spam weapon, compensating for its slow base fire rate.

weapons.name: Scottfield Spitfire
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Shortened barrel and modified trigger for higher rate of fire. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Even with faster base fire rate, Fanning further increases DPS on this single-action revolver for close encounters.

weapons.name: Scottfield Swift
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Uses a speed-loader for faster reloading. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning maximizes the Swift's potential by rapidly dumping its cylinder, leveraging its fast reload for sustained fire.

weapons.name: Shredder
weapons.description: Experimental weapon that shoots sawblades. Sawblades bounce off hard surfaces and rip into targets. Runes etchings give them the potential to ricochet in the direction of nearby enemies. Must be spun before firing. Only found at the circus.

trait_synergies.reason: Blade Seer highlights hunters hit by projectile weapons in Dark Sight, aiding bolt/arrow retrieval.

weapons.name: Slate
weapons.description: Winfield made, pump-action shotgun. High damage and fast cycle rate, with high pellet spread.

trait_synergies.reason: Slate is pump-action; Iron Eye keeps you aimed between shots, improving follow-up accuracy.

weapons.name: Slate Riposte
weapons.description: Winfield made, pump-action shotgun. High damage and fast cycle rate, with high pellet spread. Modified with a long bladed saber.

trait_synergies.reason: Slate Riposte is pump-action; Iron Eye maintains sight picture for faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Sparks
weapons.description: Big-game, single-shot rifle. High power and very effective at range, but cumbersome. Can put down a bison across a prairie.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers reduces reload time for single-shot rifles like Sparks, allowing quicker follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Sparks Pistol
weapons.description: Single-shot rifle, cut down into a small handgun. Equally powerful up to mid-range, and convenient to handle. Increased recoil. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers speeds up the single-shot reload cycle.

weapons.name: Sparks Pistol Silencer
weapons.description: Single-shot rifle, cut down into a small handgun. Equally powerful up to mid-range, and convenient to handle. Increased recoil. Modified with a silencer. Can be dual wielded.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers speeds up the single-shot reload cycle.

weapons.name: Sparks Silencer

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers reduces reload time for single-shot rifles like Sparks Silencer, enabling faster follow-up shots.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers reduces reload time for single-shot rifles like Sparks Sniper, allowing quicker follow-up shots.

weapons.description: Specter made, pump-action shotgun. Tight pellet spread and competitive rate of fire, but wasteful reloads.

trait_synergies.reason: Prevents losing the chambered round when performing a partial reload.
Specter 1882 is pump-action; Iron Eye prevents exiting iron sights, aiding rapid successive shots.

weapons.name: Specter 1882 Bayonet
weapons.description: Specter made, pump-action shotgun. Tight pellet spread and competitive rate of fire, but wasteful reloads. Modified with a bayonet for melee.

trait_synergies.reason: Prevents losing the chambered round when performing a partial reload.
Specter Bayonet is pump-action; Iron Eye keeps you aimed for quicker follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Specter 1882 Shorty
weapons.description: Specter made, pump-action shotgun. Tight pellet spread and competitive rate of fire, but wasteful reloads. Shortened stock and barrel.

trait_synergies.reason: Prevents losing the chambered round when performing a partial reload.
Specter Shorty is pump-action; Iron Eye retains aim between shots, improving accuracy.

weapons.description: See also: 1890 Cavalry .

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers pre-stages a round for faster single-shot reloads.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers reduces reload time for single-shot rifles like Springfield Marksman, enabling faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866 Shorty
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range. Shortened stock and barrel.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers speeds up reloading the single-shot Springfield Shorty, reducing downtime between shots.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866 Striker
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range. Shortened and modified with a bayonet.

trait_synergies.reason: Fast Fingers speeds up reloading the single-shot Springfield Striker, reducing downtime between shots.

weapons.name: Terminus
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating shotgun. High capacity and damage, but wasteful reloads.

trait_synergies.reason: Prevents losing the chambered round when performing a partial reload.
Terminus is lever-action; Iron Eye keeps you in sights for faster follow-up shots.
Levering increases hip-fire rate for lever-action shotguns, allowing the Terminus to fire shells rapidly.

weapons.name: Terminus Shorty
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating shotgun. High capacity and damage, but wasteful reloads. Shortened stock and barrel.

tools.name: Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick that detonates with a massive blast after four seconds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Dynamite Stick to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Waxed Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick with a modified powder fuse that enables detonation under water and in choke bomb clouds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Waxed Dynamite Stick to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Sticky Bomb
tools.description: Dynamite charge in a sticky frame that can be attached to objects and enemies. Its eight-second fuse doubles the detonation time of a dynamite stick.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Sticky Bomb to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of several dynamite sticks. Why only bring one?

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Dynamite Bundle to be thrown farther and more accurately.

tools.name: Frag Bomb
tools.description: Frag bombs send lethal shrapnel over a large area, lacerating nearby enemies. unlike dynamite however, the blast is not strong enough to destroy doors or concertina wire.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer distance from blast radius.

tools.name: Big Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of many dynamite sticks. When something really needs to be blown up.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw range, enabling hits on distant targets with large AoE.

tools.name: Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact. Spreads burning liquid over a large area.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing area denial from safer positions.

tools.name: Liquid Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container. Burns on the surface of water. Internal steel balls cause it to burst on impact.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw range, enabling fire coverage on distant chokepoints.

tools.name: Hellfire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact and creates a massive fireball.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safe deployment of lingering fire AoE.

tools.name: Knife
tools.description: An all-purpose tool and melee weapon that has saved many lives - and taken just as many.

trait_synergies.reason: Silent Killer reduces melee/throw sound by 50%, keeping attacks quiet.

tools.name: Throwing Knives
tools.description: Silent, but short-ranged projectile weapon. Thrown knives can be retrieved and re-used.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant boosts throwing damage — works directly with thrown weapons.
Blade Seer marks hunters hit by projectiles in Dark Sight.
Silent Killer reduces melee/throw sound by 50%, keeping attacks quiet.

tools.name: Heavy Knife
tools.description: The heavy knife is honed for close quarters combat, its iconic silhouette carves out its home in the American pantheon of armaments.

trait_synergies.reason: Silent Killer reduces melee/throw sound by 50%, keeping attacks quiet.

tools.name: Throwing Axes
tools.description: Silent and deadly short-ranged projectile weapon. Can be retrieved and reused.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant boosts throwing damage — works directly with thrown weapons.
Blade Seer marks hunters hit by projectiles in Dark Sight.
Silent Killer reduces melee/throw sound by 50%, keeping attacks quiet.

tools.name: Decoys
tools.description: A bag of scrap metal and glass. When thrown the noise can be effectively used to distract or divert enemies.

trait_synergies.reason: Decoy Supply grants additional uses of decoy items.
Pitcher increases throwing range, improving accuracy and distance.

tools.name: Alert Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine releases firecrackers and a small flare, alerting others to its location. Comes in a pack of four.

trait_synergies.reason: Poacher resets trap cooldowns on kills.
Vigilant extends trap detection radius.

tools.name: Chaos Bomb
tools.description: Set of firecrackers that can be used to temporarily distract nearby enemies. Duration of about 30 seconds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends chaos bomb throw range, allowing longer-distance noise creation.

tools.name: Blank Fire Decoys
tools.description: A decoy that imitates the sound of a gunshot on impact. Useful to distract and confuse enemies.

trait_synergies.reason: Decoy Supply grants additional uses of decoy items.
Pitcher increases throwing range, improving accuracy and distance.

tools.name: Decoy Fuses
tools.description: Pack of decoy fuses that can be used to breach closed doors and window shutters. It can also imitate the behavior of a lit bomb and can fool your enemies in clearing a space.

trait_synergies.reason: Decoy Supply grants additional uses of decoy items.
Pitcher increases throwing range, improving accuracy and distance.

tools.name: Fusees
tools.description: Handheld railroad flares used for illuminating dark areas and for signalling. Can ignite flammable materials. Comes in a pack of three.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, improving accuracy and distance.

tools.name: Flare Pistol
tools.description: A small pistol for firing flares into the air, illuminating the area. Can ignite flammable materials.

tools.name: First Aid Kit
tools.description: A bag of medical supplies that heal 50 health and stop bleeding. Can be used three times.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor speeds up First Aid Kit use.
Physician enhances the healing kit's effect.

tools.name: Medical Pack
tools.description: A portable medical kit that heals 100 health. Deployable in active health emergencies.

tools.name: Poison Bomb
tools.description: On detonation emits a persistant, deadly cloud. Anything caught in or that passes through the cloud will be poisoned.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, letting you place poison clouds farther away.

tools.name: Antidote Shot (Weak)
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

tools.name: Antidote Shot
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

tools.name: Hive Bomb
tools.description: Poisonous wasps emerge from this bomb to terrorize anyone unfortunate enough to be in the area. However it has no effect on monsters.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw distance, enabling you to place Hive Bombs more accurately from safer positions.

tools.name: Poison Trip Mine

tools.name: Vitality Shot (Weak)

tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all health.

tools.name: Stamina Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all stamina and stops further depletion for 5 minutes.

tools.name: Stamina Shot

tools.name: Regeneration Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot that continually restores health over a short duration.

tools.name: Regeneration Shot

trait_synergies.reason: Vigor extends the duration of regeneration/stamina shots.
